---
title: "Problems exporting files from an application"
date: 2024-12-04
forum: Desktop Environments
---

### Post by franzolin on 2024-12-04
Hi all,

I have been facing an issue since installing Ubuntu 24.04. I have searched various forums, tried dozens of fixes, and nothing seems to work.


The problem is as follows: some software I install shows a checkered screen when I try to export a file, as shown in the image below.

---

### Post by yancek on 2024-12-04
If you have had this problem since installing, why not post some information on your hardware, particularly the graphics card.
Have you tried another Linux OS?  Same problem?

You forgot to post the image so that doesn't help.  The software you mention all appears to be third party software which is downloaded from the respective site and does not seem to be available in the Ubuntu repositories so you are basically dependent upon the install instructions on the respective web site of the software.

---
